Uncharted (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $148,648,820Details
International Box Office $258,492,438
Worldwide Box Office $407,141,258
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,343,560
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $9,641,127
Total $13,984,687
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Street-smart thief Nathan Drake is recruited by seasoned treasure hunter Victor “Sully” Sullivan to recover a fortune lost by Ferdinand Magellan 500 years ago. What starts as a heist job for the duo becomes a globe-trotting, white-knuckle race to reach the prize before the ruthless Moncada, who believes he and his family are the rightful heirs. If Nate and Sully can decipher the clues and solve one of the world’s oldest mysteries, they stand to find $5 billion in treasure and perhaps even Nate’s long-lost brother… but only if they can learn to work together.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$44,010,155 (29.6% of total gross)
Legs:3.38 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:36.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$120,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,275 opening theaters/4,275 max. theaters, 7.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $168,835,696

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 18th, 2022 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
February 18th, 2022 (IMAX) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: February 10th, 2022 (Wide), released as Анчартед: На картах не значится (Russia (CIS))

Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.


  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

Street-smart thief Nathan Drake is recruited by seasoned treasure hunter Victor “Sully” Sullivan to recover a fortune lost by Ferdinand Magellan 500 years ago. What starts as a heist job for the duo becomes a globe-trotting, white-knuckle race to reach the prize before the ruthless Moncada, who believes he and his family are the rightful heirs. If Nate and Sully can decipher the clues and solve one of the world’s oldest mysteries, they stand to find $5 billion in treasure and perhaps even Nate’s long-lost brother… but only if they can learn to work together.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$44,010,155 (29.6% of total gross)

Domestic Share:36.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$120,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,275 opening theaters/4,275 max. theaters, 7.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $168,835,696
